question_text: The figure shows two 4-tile patterns. Either one or both of the patterns can be used any number of times and in any orientation to construct a new pattern. Which one of the options below cannot be

options.C: onstructed by using only these two 4-tile patterns assuming there are no overlaps
options.D: eclare the winner of the tournament?
options.B: When the teacher is in the room, all students are silent.
